meta.title: Samarth Borade — AI Engineer
meta.description: AI Engineer & MS Computer Science @ USC. I ship production LLM systems, agentic frameworks, and ML platforms. Co-author of 'Age of Agentic AI'.

personal.name: Samarth Borade
personal.title: AI Engineer
personal.subtitle: Builds agentic systems, ML platforms & production LLM pipelines.
personal.tagline: Available for Summer 2026 internships & new collaborations

about.bio: I'm an AI Engineer and MS Computer Science student at the University of Southern California. I design and ship production-grade LLM systems — agentic frameworks, RAG pipelines, ML platforms — the kind that survive contact with real users.
about.subBio: Previously founding engineer at Ai-Horizon (drove a $2.4M seed valuation in 3 months), data scientist at Allcargo Logistics, and Merit Scholar in the top 5% of my B.Tech cohort. Co-author of the upcoming Amazon book 'Age of Agentic AI'.
focus: Architecting multi-agent LLM systems with persistent memory & tool routing
Building end-to-end ML platforms — training, evaluation, deployment, drift
Researching agentic AI patterns & publishing for working ML engineers

experience.title: AI Engineer Intern & Founding Engineer
experience.description: Founding engineer on an agentic AI platform spanning insurance, logistics, and finance. Architected the core LLM/agent layer that became the company's primary product offering and helped drive a $2.4M seed valuation in 3 months.
achievements: Shipped 40+ production AI agents using LLM pipelines, RAG, and RLHF; drove $2.4M seed valuation in 3 months.

Architected the neural-network-backed agentic framework + LangChain LLM layer from scratch with prompt engineering, tool use, and vector-store retrieval — the scalable library became the company's primary product offering.
Built DataSculptor, an ML dataset cleaning pipeline with PII detection, toxicity filtering, and embedding-based deduplication across 20+ datasets / 500K+ records, cutting preprocessing time by 60%.

experience.title: Data Science Intern
experience.description: Designed Python ETL pipelines, ML forecasting models, and Power BI dashboards for transportation and warehousing operations across 5+ hubs.
achievements: Drove 10% gain in delivery efficiency and 15% reduction in operational delays through data pipelines and dashboarding.
Built an 8-module Simulation Operations Dashboard with ML demand forecasting (MAE 8.2%) and drill-down visualizations for real-time planning.
Modeled a dynamic pricing optimization engine on 10,000+ transactions; deployed to production, lifting revenue per shipment 5–8% with zero churn increase.

projects.title: OMNI.ai - Powered Website Generator
projects.description: Full-stack app that converts natural language prompts into live websites with real-time in-browser code execution and preview using WebAssembly-powered WebContainer, all in under 2 minutes.
projects.longDescription: Built a comprehensive website generation platform that leverages AI to transform natural language descriptions into fully functional websites. The system uses WebAssembly-powered WebContainer for real-time code execution and preview, enabling users to see their websites come to life instantly.
highlights: Support for multiple AI models (GPT, Claude, Groq, Ollama)
Complete website generation in under 2 minutes

projects.title: SynthMaster - AI Dataset Creation Tool
projects.description: Synthetic dataset creation tool integrating over 50 conversational formats across various LLMs with customizable GPU and cloud selection options.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive tool for creating synthetic datasets with support for over 50 different conversational formats. The platform offers flexibility in model choice, GPU selection, and cloud deployment options, making it highly versatile for various AI training scenarios.

projects.title: DataSculptor - LLM Dataset Curator
projects.description: Tool for cleaning and curating 20+ LLM-generated datasets with PII detection, toxicity filtering, and semantic search capabilities.
projects.longDescription: Engineered a sophisticated data curation platform that automatically cleans and processes LLM-generated datasets. The tool incorporates advanced features like PII detection, toxicity filtering, language identification, and semantic search to ensure high-quality, safe datasets for AI model training.
highlights: Toxicity filtering across thousands of records

projects.title: ChatZilla - NLP Data Query System
projects.description: NLP-based assistant capable of querying data from structured formats like Excel and CSV files using LLMs for data interpretation.
projects.longDescription: Created an intelligent data query system that uses natural language processing to interact with structured data files. The system leverages LLMs to interpret and analyze data from Excel and CSV files, making data analysis more accessible through conversational interfaces.
highlights: Support for Excel and CSV formats

projects.title: WHO - Voice Identification System
projects.description: CNN-based system to identify speakers from 3-second audio clips using spectrograms with data augmentation on 500+ audio samples.
projects.longDescription: Developed a sophisticated voice identification system using Convolutional Neural Networks. The system analyzes spectrograms generated from short audio clips to accurately identify speakers, with robust data augmentation techniques applied to enhance model performance and accuracy.

projects.title: Simulation Operations Dashboard
projects.description: Power BI dashboard with machine learning forecasting for monthly data trends to support operational planning.
projects.longDescription: Built a comprehensive 8-page Power BI dashboard featuring advanced visualizations including bar graphs, line charts, and interactive slicers. The dashboard incorporates machine learning models for trend forecasting and enables users to explore data at granular levels for informed decision-making.

projects.title: Dynamic Price Scoring System
projects.description: Sales performance evaluation tool using dynamic pricing strategies, analyzing 10,000+ transactions for revenue optimization.
projects.longDescription: Developed an advanced pricing optimization system that evaluates sales performance and customer behavior through dynamic pricing strategies. The system analyzes market demand and supply metrics from over 10,000 transactions to optimize pricing decisions and improve competitiveness.

certifications.name: Transformer-Based Natural Language Processing
certifications.description: Attention mechanisms, BERT/GPT pretraining, and fine-tuning workflows.

certifications.name: Google Cloud Community Day Workshop
certifications.description: Hands-on workshop on cloud-native ML deployment.

achievements.title: 1st Prize — DronaHQ Hackathon
achievements.description: Built an Android app for paperless logistics; selected from 200+ teams.

achievements.title: Merit Scholar — Top 5% of Cohort
achievements.description: B.Tech in Computer Engineering, SVKM's MPSTME.

education.institution: SVKM's Mukesh Patel School of Technology Management

research.title: Age of Agentic AI: Building Machines That Think, Decide & Act
research.description: Co-authored a practitioner's guide on intent-driven agent execution, tool-use orchestration, and multi-agent collaboration patterns for production autonomous systems — written for working ML and backend engineers.

research.title: Automated Classification of Musical Genres
research.publisher: Springer ICRTCIS 2024 · Algorithms for Intelligent Systems
research.description: Engineered a Random Forest classifier with audio feature engineering (MFCCs, RMS, spectral centroid, zero-crossing rate) achieving 80.12% accuracy across 10 genres on GTZAN — outperforming CNN-RNN (56.4%) and ANN (64.06%) baselines.

articles.title: AI Wonderland — Demystifying LLMs & Generative AI
articles.description: An ongoing series breaking down agentic AI, LLM internals, and Generative AI patterns for working engineers.

articles.title: Power BI Series — Featured Author
articles.description: Data visualization and BI series featured by the official Microsoft Power BI publication.
